hero.spacing: pt-32 pb-24 flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-8

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border-b border-zinc-900
header.layout: flex justify-between items-center h-16 px-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto

buttons.primary: bg-[#39FF14] text-black font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-[#32E612] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(57,255,20,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(57,255,20,0.4)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-full hover:bg-zinc-900 transition-colors border border-transparent hover:border-zinc-800

feature_card.container: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden group transition-all duration-500 hover:border-[#39FF14]/50
feature_card.glow_effect: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#39FF14]/0 to-[#39FF14]/5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-500
feature_card.icon_wrapper: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-zinc-900 flex items-center justify-center border border-zinc-800 mb-6 text-[#39FF14] group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500

modals.container: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md p-8 relative shadow-2xl shadow-black

forms.input: w-full bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#39FF14] focus:border-[#39FF14] transition-all
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-zinc-400 mb-2

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must have clear hover states. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) with enhanced glow.
motion_and_interactions.entrances: Use Framer Motion to fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> 0) hero elements and feature cards on mount, with staggered delays.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: Form inputs must have a 1px solid neon green border and a subtle ring on focus.

images.description: Dark gym interior. USE ONLY AS A VERY FAINT BACKGROUND LAYER (opacity-10 or 20, blend-mode: luminosity or mask-image fading out) behind the hero text to give it an athletic texture without overpowering the Vercel-style clean UI.
Row of exercise machines. Can be used inside a feature card if needed to show environment, heavily masked or grayscale.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required fonts: `yarn add @fontsource/outfit @fontsource/manrope` and configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Implement the landing page with three main sections: Hero, Features (3 columns), and Footer.
Ensure the Header has a 'FitCheck' text logo and a Login/Signup CTA.
The Hero must be text-heavy, centered, massive typography, very clean. No large bright images. Use a subtle radial gradient behind the text or the heavily muted gym texture provided in media.
Create reusable Shadcn-inspired UI components for the Modals and Forms but heavily customize them with pure black backgrounds, zinc-800 borders, and neon green focus rings.
The Features section must use the 'Bento' or tight grid protocol. Each card must have a glowing hover effect (`hover:border-[#39FF14]/50`).
All text must strictly adhere to the high contrast requirements against the black background.
Add `data-testid` to all CTAs, form inputs, and buttons.
For the Signup/Login modals, use a controlled state to render them over the UI with a `backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/80` overlay.
Do NOT use Inter font. Do NOT use standard Shadcn borders without customizing to the dark neon aesthetic.
